context: Italian music in 2020 was dominated by homegrown talent. Rocco Hunt and Ana Mena's summer anthem 'A un passo dalla luna' topped the year-end chart, while the Italian rap and trap scene (Ernia, tha Supreme, Ghali) had fully arrived in the mainstream. Despite the pandemic, Italian artists thrived — Gazzelle and Irama represented a new generation of Italian pop-rock and pop.

tracks.title: Hypnotized
tracks.artist: Purple Disco Machine & Sophie and the Giants
